spec_match.rationale: Outstanding coverage of 8 distinct sizing specs.

interactive.rationale: Includes 3 custom range sliders (width, margin, padding) that re-compute box boundaries and show explicit red overflow warning tags on the fly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Highlights the standardisation of the -webkit lineage perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: Features complex live box rect computation listeners.

design_system.rationale: Uses gorgeous linear-gradient margin gotcha strip patterns.

summary: A spectacular multi-slider interactive comparison lab showcasing 8 box width keywords side-by-side.
